texto: Generations of parents have upheld this line if thinking. When a daughter showed a promise of talent, they saw it as a curse and worried that she would die young. Eventually, the very lack of talent became a sure sign of virtue for women.
explicacao: Citação de He Zhen sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Generations of parents have upheld this line if thinking. When a daughter showed a promise of tal…” articula reflexao, feminism, women em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como women.
